tool_args.label: Minutes of Regular Meeting Committee on Operations November 29, 2023

payload.title: Minutes of Regular Meeting Committee on Operations of the MTA New York City Transit Authority, Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority, Staten Island Rapid Transit Operating Authority, and MTA Bus Company November 29, 2023

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: MTA New York City Transit Authority

payload.entity_name: MTA New York City Transit Authority

payload.title: Chief Officer of Bus Technology, NYCT
Deputy Chief Accessibility Officer / Chief Accessibility Officer

payload.description: Completed bus lane on Gun Hill Road to speed up trips crosstown, benefitting nearly 40,000 customers
Eastbound busway on Livingston Street opened in downtown Brooklyn, benefiting over 50,000 bus customers daily
Phase III of enhanced subway service will go live in December on the C, N, R, and G lines, bringing faster, more frequent subway service

ACE will be implemented in May 2024 as a four-year demonstration. Activated on fourteen routes in May 2024, expand to another 400 buses and fourteen additional routes, then add ten routes per year from 2025 through 2027

tool_args.label: Citywide Bus Lane Enforcement Task Force

payload.project_name: Citywide Bus Lane Enforcement Task Force
payload.description: NYPD creating a Bus Lane Enforcement Task Force to deter parking violations in bus lanes, busways, bus stops, expedite bus routes and improve traffic safety. Begins December 4, 2023

tool_args.label: Phase III enhanced subway service launch

payload.description: Phase III of enhanced subway service goes live on the C, N, R, and G lines
ACE will be activated on fourteen routes in May 2024

tool_args.label: Citywide Bus Lane Enforcement Task Force start

payload.description: Citywide Bus Lane Enforcement Task Force begins
Billionth subway customer on November 14th, forty-four days earlier than in 2022
Crosstown corridor where a bus lane was completed
Eastbound busway in downtown Brooklyn
On-Time Performance for 2023 thus far is above 83%, the best annual performance since electronic record keeping began over a decade ago
Customer Journey Time Performance is at 84.9%, also a historic high
Maintenance of Way team has installed 730 track panels which reduce defects in some of our most problematic areas to maintain
Subway service has improved on eight lines on nights, weekends, and mid-days so far this year, reducing headways by two minutes in each instance
